'''Eoodso''' was a [[Jeodu]] member of [[Black Nebula (organization)|Black Nebula]], a personal guard for [[Dequc]] as of [[4 ABY/Legends|4.5 ABY]].<ref name="Mara Jade 6" />

==Appearances==
*[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 6|''Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand'' 6]] {{1st}}
